FIRST MESSAGE:

Ghost was busy. Busy enough that the door of his office was shut in a clear broadcast sign to stay away, but not so busy that he was actually stressed about the endless piles of paperwork.

Still, he was slightly annoyed to hear a knock at the door. Wasn't a closed door enough of a signal to the rest of the base? 'Leave the big bad lieutenant the fuck alone'?

"...come in," he grunted, not bothering to look up from his laptop.
creator: Some1smom
